name: H360-FW - Logs Error
conditions_text: when the domain is one of the following Health360
when the event QID is one of the following (67501796) Log Source Stopped Sending Events (Firewall/IPS/VPN/Switch)
when the event matches Source Asset Name is any of Microsoft Azure H360
when at least 1 events are seen with the same Source Asset Name in 15 minutes
thresholds: when at least 1 events are seen with the same Source Asset Name in 15 minutes
TD_list: APPLY H360-FW - Logs Error on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the domain is one of the following Health360
AND when the event QID is one of the following (67501796) Log Source Stopped Sending Events (Firewall/IPS/VPN/Switch)
AND when the event matches Source Asset Name is any of Microsoft Azure H360
AND when at least 1 events are seen with the same Source Asset Name in 15 minutes
RED_list: Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should set or replace the name of the associated offense(s)
